Update regularly so you never miss fresh levels, events & surprises!

title: Mystery Town: Merge Games
notes: More exciting events will be launched one after another, stay tuned！

title: Truck Star
notes:
Ready for an exciting update?

- 100 new levels packed with thrilling challenges!
- Repair and upgrade the brand-new truck [Rift-W16]!
- The all-new event [Speed Grand Prix] is here!
- Join your friends in the new event [Ride with Crew] to earn even more rewards!
- The new merge event [Surf Safari] is coming soon!

Even more fun content is now live in the game—log in and check it out!

title: iKout
notes:
- Fixed an issue in the game score pad.
- Fixed an issue with in-app purchases.

title: Jurassic World™: The Game
notes:
- Keep your eyes to the sky - a NEW Heroic is landing in your park!
- Celebrate the 11th Anniversary with a brand new decoration to place in your park!
- Identified and fixed crashes ocurring on iPads with low memory.
- Additional bug fixes and optimizations for a smoother experience.

title: EA SPORTS FC™ 26 Companion
notes:
We’re continuing to make improvements to the Companion App. 
In this patch we:

- Fixed an unresponsive button when claiming Rivals rewards.
- Added a back arrow when accessing Evos on landscape devices.
- Expired Evo slots no longer hidden if there are unclaimed rewards.
- Fixed the locked team filter for Squad Builder in SBCs.
- Fixed sorting options for players in Evos.

- The Companion Team
